app.title: NOIA2
app.description: A floating utility companion built with Tauri, React, and Rust.

greet.title: Greet from Rust
greet.description: Test the communication between frontend and Tauri backend

about.title: About
about.description: A floating desktop helper for NOIA2.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Customize the appearance and language of the app
appearance.mainWindowDescription: Main window and DPS window are stored separately so we can tune them independently.
appearance.backgroundColorDescription: Controls the shell color used for the main window surface.
appearance.backgroundOpacityDescription: Keeps room to make the main window more solid or more glass-like later.
appearance.dpsWindowDescription: These settings directly affect the floating DPS window and the preview below uses mock data.
appearance.autoResizeHeightDescription: Automatically adjusts the DPS window height to its current content.
appearance.showHeaderStatsDescription: Controls whether the compact damage, participants, and target cards are shown above the panel.
appearance.scaleFactorDescription: Changes the compactness of the floating DPS tool.
appearance.previewDescription: Mock combat data is used here so you can preview color, scale, panel opacity, and header visibility.

shortcut.title: Shortcuts
shortcut.showMainDesc: Use shortcut to quickly show the main window

dps.title: DPS Meter
dps.description: Configure backend DPS snapshot frequency, debug logging, and combat filtering rules.
dps.snapshotIntervalDescription: How often the backend sends DPS snapshots to the frontend, in milliseconds.
dps.bossOnlyDescription: Only count damage against targets that are recognized as bosses.
dps.myMuzhuangOnlyDescription: When the target is a training dummy, only count damage dealt by your own character.
dps.outputDebugLogDescription: Write additional DPS capture and dispatcher debug logs to the backend log file.

panel.title: Live DPS Panel
panel.waitingHint: Start the meter and lock onto a target to populate this panel.
